CustomObject.description: Platform Event for the public /account-paused restore-link flow. Guest users on the Experience Cloud site can publish this event but lack the permissions to read User/Contact, mint tokens, or send email. The subscriber (ReactivationRequestEventTrigger -> FimbyReactivationRequestEventHandler) runs as the Automated Process user, which has system-level access, so all of that work happens after the guest transaction returns.
CustomObject.label: Reactivation Request Event
